  1. model

Uses of Class
model.SocialNetwork

Packages that use SocialNetwork
Package
Description
persistence
File-based persistence for social-network data.
service
Business services for authentication, users, friendships, and recommendations.
ui.javafx
JavaFX application setup and shared controller context.

  • Uses of SocialNetwork in persistence

    Methods in persistence that return SocialNetwork
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SocialNetwork
    NetworkFileManager.loadFromFile(String filePath)
    Loads and validates a social network from a UTF-8 text file.
    Methods in persistence with parameters of type SocialNetwork
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    NetworkFileManager.saveToFile(SocialNetwork network, String filePath)
    Saves all users and unique undirected friendships to a text file.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SocialNetwork
    AppContext.getNetwork()
    Returns the shared social network.
    Methods in ui.javafx with parameters of type SocialNetwork
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AppContext.replaceCurrentNetworkData(SocialNetwork loadedNetwork)
    Replaces the contents of the shared network while retaining the same network object used by all services.

    Constructor
